mechanism_narrative: The federal funds rate at 0.65% is near historical lows, signaling an accommodative monetary stance. Sustained low rates compress long-term discount rates and reduce real yields, causing the 10-year Treasury yield to decline over the next 20 trading days as investors seek duration exposure in a low-rate environment.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield rises by more than 15 basis points over the 20-day window despite FEDFUNDS remaining below 1.0%, or Rank IC < 0.05 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment rate at 4.4% combined with payroll employment at 151,786k indicates a tight labor market. Sustained tight labor conditions drive wage inflation expectations, which compress real yields and cause the 10-year Treasury yield to fall as inflation expectations rise faster than nominal yields.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE remains below 4.5% and PAYEMS growth exceeds 100k per month
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield rises by more than 20 basis points despite both UNRATE < 4.5% and PAYEMS growth > 100k, or the joint signal produces Rank IC < 0.04 over any 18-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Retail sales at 483,066 million dollars and housing starts at 1,599k units signal robust consumer demand. Strong demand growth raises inflation expectations and nominal growth forecasts, causing the 10-year Treasury yield to rise as investors demand higher compensation for inflation risk over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS month-over-month growth exceeds 0.5% and HOUST exceeds 1,500k units
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield falls by more than 15 basis points despite both RSAFS growth > 0.5% and HOUST > 1,500k, or interaction signal produces Rank IC < 0.04 over any 18-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production at 103.66 (index 2017=100) reflects supply-side capacity utilization. If industrial production growth decelerates below 0.2% month-over-month, it signals supply constraints that raise inflation expectations, causing the 10-year Treasury yield to rise as real yields compress over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield falls by more than 20 basis points despite INDPRO growth < 0.2%, or the signal produces Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: CPI at 257.953 (index 1982-1984=100) combined with FEDFUNDS at 0.65% implies a deeply negative real federal funds rate. If CPI accelerates month-over-month above 0.4%, it signals inflation persistence that forces the Fed to tighten, causing the 10-year Treasury yield to rise sharply over the next 5 trading days as markets front-run rate hikes.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL month-over-month growth exceeds 0.4% and FEDFUNDS remains below 1.0%
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield falls by more than 10 basis points over 5 trading days despite CPI growth > 0.4% and FEDFUNDS < 1.0%, or the interaction signal produces Rank IC < 0.05 over any 18-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP at 19,221.97 billion chained 2017 dollars (6-month-old data) combined with current retail sales and housing data indicates sustained demand. If quarterly GDP growth decelerates below 1.5% annualized, it signals demand weakness that causes the 10-year Treasury yield to fall over the next 60 trading days as growth expectations compress.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter growth annualized falls below 1.5%
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield rises by more than 50 basis points over 60 trading days despite GDPC1 growth < 1.5%, or the signal produces Rank IC < 0.04 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment rate at 4.4% is near historical lows. If unemployment rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months, it signals labor market deterioration that reduces inflation expectations and causes the 10-year Treasury yield to fall sharply over the next 20 trading days as recession fears mount.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points in 3 months
regime_hint: labor market deterioration or early recession signal
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield rises by more than 15 basis points over 20 trading days despite UNRATE rising > 0.3pp in 3 months, or the signal produces Rank IC < 0.05 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production at 103.66 combined with payroll employment at 151,786k indicates strong supply-side capacity. If both INDPRO and PAYEMS decline simultaneously, it signals stagflation risk where supply contracts while demand remains sticky, causing the 10-year Treasury yield to rise as inflation expectations dominate over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO month-over-month growth falls below -0.1% and PAYEMS month-over-month growth falls below 0%
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield falls by more than 40 basis points over 60 trading days despite both INDPRO < -0.1% and PAYEMS < 0%, or the interaction signal produces Rank IC < 0.04 over any 18-month rolling window.
